name: Awareness Reminder
purpose: Open a campaign sequence by naming the problem and creating urgency around emotional learning.

layout_guidance.eyebrow_role: Signal the audience problem or emotional learning theme.
layout_guidance.headline_role: Lead with the human tension before introducing Bibblio.
body_pattern: Name the pain the recipient already recognizes.
Explain why generic content or lessons miss the emotional moment.
Introduce story creation as the easier first step.
